headline: AI Engineer, Developer Advocate @ IBM | Stanford MSCS
about: I build AI applications, talk about them, and help other devs do the same (with fewer headaches).

currentPosition.description:
Bridging the gap between developers and AI innovation through content, community, and code. 
➤ Crafting technical explainers, tutorials, and videos to translate complex AI topics into practical knowledge and hands-on applications.
➤ Speaking at international tech conferences and hosting webinars to educate and engage developer communities.
➤ Engineering internal tools that streamline workflows and leverage agentic AI.

multiLocaleHeadline.headline: AI Engineer, Developer Advocate @ IBM | Stanford MSCS

experience.description:
Bridging the gap between developers and AI innovation through content, community, and code. 
➤ Crafting technical explainers, tutorials, and videos to translate complex AI topics into practical knowledge and hands-on applications.
➤ Speaking at international tech conferences and hosting webinars to educate and engage developer communities.
➤ Engineering internal tools that streamline workflows and leverage agentic AI.

experience.position: Social Computing Lab - Lead Research Assistant
experience.location: New Brunswick, New Jersey, United States
experience.companyName: Rutgers University School of Communication and Information
experience.description:
➤ Utilized Twitter and Reddit APIs to collect and clean data to produce co-occurrence networks, sentiment analysis, data visualization, BERTopic modeling, data visualization, and qualitative coding using Python, R, and Tableau.
➤ Built exponential random graph models (ERGMs) and multi-layered networks for complex social networks in R.
➤ Conducted research in relation to how ethnic minorities access COVID-related information online using data science tools.
➤ Presented the research at the 18th annual Aresty Undergraduate Research Symposium

experience.location: New Brunswick, New Jersey, United States
experience.companyName: Rutgers School of Arts and Sciences
experience.description:
➤ Conducted research on Rutgers University's Introduction to Data Science course in order to improve it. 
➤ Designed wireframes and coded the front end of a new grading platform, CodeBench using JavaScript and React.
➤ Interviewed and surveyed students who had taken the course prior to gain feedback.

➤ Built and implemented knowledge in JS, HTML, CSS, and more in order to build features in the start-up's social media platform, trychats.
➤ Researched gpt-3, cryptocurrencies, crypto mining, decentralized networks, NFTs, and blockchain technology.

education.description:
➤ Graduated from the Honors College summa cum laude with a B.S. in Computer Science (High Honors) and B.A. in Cognitive Science (Highest Honors). 
➤ Member of the Phi Beta Kappa Honor Society and awarded the Dean's List all semesters
education.insights: Activities and societies: Polish Club President, Honors College Ally (First-Year Mentor), Alpha Omega Epsilon Recruitment Chair, Women in Computer Science Club.

education.description:
➤ Graduated with THHS Honors & Service Distinction
➤ Archon & Arista National Honor Societies, National Science Honors Society
➤ 99% percentile SAT
